9:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s."School ID") AS charter_schools_count
FROM "Schools" s
JOIN "SAT Scores" sat ON s."School ID" = sat."School ID"
WHERE
    
    (LOWER(s."School Funding Type") LIKE '%charter%'
     OR LOWER(s."School Funding Type") LIKE '%чартер%')
    
    AND LOWER(s."School Funding Type") NOT LIKE '%partial%'
    AND LOWER(s."School Funding Type") NOT LIKE '%part%'
    AND LOWER(s."School Funding Type") NOT LIKE '%част%'
    
    AND CAST(REPLACE(sat."Math Avg. Score", ',', '') AS INTEGER) > 560;
13:
WITH sat_stats AS (
    SELECT
        s."School Name",
        s."Phone Number",
        SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(sats."SAT Math Avg. Score" AS INTEGER) +
                      CAST(sats."SAT Critical Reading Avg. Score" AS INTEGER) +
                      CAST(sats."SAT Writing Avg. Score" AS INTEGER) >= 1500
                 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS num_ge_1500,
        COUNT(*) AS num_test_takers,
        
        CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0
             THEN SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(sats."SAT Math Avg. Score" AS INTEGER) +
                                CAST(sats."SAT Critical Reading Avg. Score" AS INTEGER) +
                                CAST(sats."SAT Writing Avg. Score" AS INTEGER) >= 1500
                           THEN 1.0 ELSE 0.0 END) / COUNT(*)
             ELSE 0.0 END AS excellence_rate
    FROM
        "SAT_Results" sats
    JOIN
        "School" s ON sats."DBN" = s."DBN"
    WHERE
        sats."SAT Math Avg. Score" IS NOT NULL
        AND sats."SAT Critical Reading Avg. Score" IS NOT NULL
        AND sats."SAT Writing Avg. Score" IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY
        s."School Name", s."Phone Number"
)
SELECT
    "Phone Number"
FROM
    sat_stats
ORDER BY
    excellence_rate DESC
LIMIT 3;
17:
SELECT
    s."School Name" AS school_name,
    s."Charter Number" AS charter_number,
    AVG(CAST(w."Writing" AS INTEGER)) AS avg_writing_score
FROM
    "SAT Scores" w
JOIN
    "Schools" s ON w."DBN" = s."DBN"
WHERE
    CAST(w."Writing" AS INTEGER) > 499
    AND s."Charter Number" IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY
    s."School Name",
    s."Charter Number"
ORDER BY
    avg_writing_score DESC;
325:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m."molecule_id") AS carcinogenic_nitrogen_molecules_count
FROM "molecule" m
JOIN "molecule_element" me ON m."molecule_id" = me."molecule_id"
JOIN "element" e ON me."element_id" = e."element_id"
WHERE LOWER(e."symbol") = 'n'
  AND m."label" = '+';
276:
SELECT
    "atom_id" AS first_atom_id,
    "atom_id2" AS second_atom_id
FROM
    "bonds"
WHERE
    "bond_type" = '#';
498:
SELECT DISTINCT cs."name" AS french_set_name
FROM "card_sets" cs
JOIN "cards" c ON cs."id" = c."card_set_id"
JOIN "translations" t ON c."id" = t."card_id"
WHERE t."language" = 'French'
  AND t."translation" LIKE '%Tendo%Ice%Bridge%';
417:
SELECT
    ROUND(
        COUNT(CASE WHEN LOWER(TRIM("language")) LIKE '%japanese%' AND LOWER(TRIM("type")) LIKE '%expansion%' THEN 1 END)::FLOAT /
        NULLIF(COUNT(CASE WHEN LOWER(TRIM("language")) LIKE '%japanese%' THEN 1 END), 0) * 100,
        2
    ) AS percentage_japanese_expansion_sets
FROM
    "sets";
345:
SELECT DISTINCT
    c."name" AS card_name,
    l."status" AS vintage_legality_status
FROM
    "cards" c
JOIN
    "legalities" l ON c."id" = l."card_id"
WHERE
    
    c."type" LIKE '%Artifact%'
    
    AND c."side" IS NULL
    
    AND l."format" LIKE '%vintage%';
1533:
SELECT
    t."ClientId" AS client_id,
    c."ConsumptionStatus" AS consumption_status
FROM
    "Transactions" t
JOIN
    "Clients" c ON t."ClientId" = c."ClientId"
WHERE
    t."ProductId" = '5'
    AND t."Date" LIKE '201208%'
    AND (CAST(t."Price" AS NUMERIC) / NULLIF(CAST(t."Amount" AS NUMERIC), 0)) > 29.00;
1480:
SELECT
    t."yearmonth" AS peak_month
FROM
    "transactions" t
JOIN
    "customers" c ON t."customer_id" = c."customer_id"
WHERE
    
    t."yearmonth" BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    
    AND c."customer_type" LIKE '%SME%'
    
    AND t."category" LIKE '%gas%'
GROUP BY
    t."yearmonth"
ORDER BY
    SUM(CAST(REPLACE(t."amount", ',', '.') AS NUMERIC)) DESC
LIMIT 1;
1529:
SELECT
    SUM(CASE
        WHEN LOWER(t."MCC Description") LIKE '%gas station%'
             OR LOWER(t."MCC Description") LIKE '%автозаправ%'
             OR LOWER(t."MCC Description") LIKE '%заправ%'
        THEN CAST(REPLACE(t."Amount", ',', '.') AS DECIMAL(15, 2))
        ELSE 0
    END) AS total_gas_station_spent,
    SUM(CASE
        WHEN t."Date" >= '20120101' AND t."Date" <= '20120131'
        THEN CAST(REPLACE(t."Amount", ',', '.') AS DECIMAL(15, 2))
        ELSE 0
    END) AS january_2012_spent
FROM
    "Transactions" t
WHERE
    t."Customer ID" = '38508';
1472:
SELECT
    c."Customer_Name" AS customer_name
FROM
    "Consumption" c
JOIN
    "YearMonth" ym ON c."Date" = ym."YearMonth_ID"
WHERE
    
    c."Region" LIKE '%LAM%'
    
    AND ym."YearMonth_ID" BETWEEN '201201' AND '201212'
GROUP BY
    c."Customer_ID", c."Customer_Name"
ORDER BY
    SUM(CAST(REPLACE(c."Consumption", ',', '.') AS DECIMAL)) ASC
LIMIT 1;
180:
SELECT
    c."client_id" AS "ID клиента"
FROM
    "clients" c
JOIN
    "accounts" a ON c."client_id" = a."client_id"
JOIN
    "branches" b ON a."branch_id" = b."branch_id"
WHERE
    
    TO_DATE(c."birth_date", 'YYYY-MM-DD') BETWEEN '1983-01-01' AND '1987-12-31'
    
    AND (
        b."region" LIKE '%East Bohemia%'
        OR b."region" LIKE '%Восточн% Богем%'
        OR b."region" LIKE '%Východní Čechy%'
    );
113:
SELECT
    c."birthday" AS client_birthday
FROM
    "clients" c
JOIN
    "loans" l ON c."client_id" = l."client_id"
WHERE
    TO_DATE(l."loan_date", 'YYYY/MM/DD') = TO_DATE('1996/01/03', 'YYYY/MM/DD')
    AND REPLACE(l."loan_amount", ',', '')::numeric = 98832;
589:
SELECT "user_id"
FROM "users"
WHERE "reputation" = (SELECT MAX(CAST("reputation" AS INTEGER)) FROM "users")
LIMIT 1;
685:
SELECT
    SUM(CAST("ViewCount" AS INTEGER)) AS "total_views",
    "DisplayName" AS "user_who_posted_last"
FROM
    "Posts" p
WHERE
    p."Text" LIKE '%Computer Game Datasets%'
    AND p."PostTypeId" = '1'  
ORDER BY
    p."CreationDate" DESC
LIMIT 1;
1365:
WITH min_remaining_budget AS (
    SELECT
        "budget_id"
    FROM
        "budgets"
    ORDER BY
        CAST("remaining" AS DECIMAL) ASC
    LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    e."expense_description"
FROM
    "expenses" e
JOIN
    min_remaining_budget mrb ON e."budget_id" = mrb."budget_id";
1388:
SELECT
    s."first_name" || ' ' || s."last_name" AS full_name,
    i."source" AS income_source,
    CAST(i."amount" AS NUMERIC) AS income_amount
FROM
    "students" s
JOIN
    "income" i ON s."id" = i."student_id"
WHERE
    CAST(i."amount" AS NUMERIC) = (
        SELECT MAX(CAST("amount" AS NUMERIC))
        FROM "income"
    )
ORDER BY
    full_name;
1339:
SELECT AVG(CAST("amount" AS NUMERIC)) AS average_cost
FROM "expense" e
JOIN "client" c ON e."client_id" = c."client_id"
WHERE c."first_name" LIKE '%Elijah%'
  AND c."last_name" LIKE '%Allen%'
  AND TO_DATE(e."expense_date", 'DD.MM.YYYY') BETWEEN '2023-09-01' AND '2023-10-31';
1359:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN b."event_name" LIKE '%October Meeting%' THEN CAST(b."amount" AS NUMERIC) ELSE 0 END) = 0
        THEN NULL 
        ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN b."event_name" LIKE '%Yearly Kickoff%' THEN CAST(b."amount" AS NUMERIC) ELSE 0 END) /
             SUM(CASE WHEN b."event_name" LIKE '%October Meeting%' THEN CAST(b."amount" AS NUMERIC) ELSE 0 END)
    END AS budget_ratio
FROM
    "budget" b
WHERE
    b."category" = 'Advertisement';
1429:
SELECT DISTINCT e."event_name"
FROM "Student_Club" sc
JOIN "Club_Membership" cm ON sc."club_id" = cm."club_id"
JOIN "Person" p ON cm."person_id" = p."person_id"
JOIN "Event_Attendance" ea ON p."person_id" = ea."person_id"
JOIN "Event" e ON ea."event_id" = e."event_id"
WHERE e."type" = 'Social'
  AND cm."position" LIKE '%Vice President%'
  AND sc."location" LIKE '%900 E. Washington St%';
